since_last: 60% of 89 AI names green; AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads +3.79%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 60% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.33% · BTC +1.23% · Gold +2.06% · Nasdaq100 -1.04%. 60% of 89 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure is doing the heavy lifting at +3.79%.

cards.headline: AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at +3.79%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -3.12%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: CRWD is the standout at +10.87%
cards.body: Leaders: CRWD +10.87%, META +7.55%, APP +7.49%, PLTR +5.99%, S +5.04%. Laggards: TER -6.99%, KLAC -6.42%, LRCX -6.23%, MU -6.22%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -4.54% at $163.11
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -4.54% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
